Food Truck Lot.name: Food Truck Lot
Food Truck Lot.description: A busy parking lot turned street food hub. Taco Time Truck is parked in the far corner, surrounded by a lunch crowd. Smoke from the grill hangs in the air. The smell of charred meat and hot oil is overwhelming.
Food Truck Lot.first_entry_text:
You spot the Taco Time Truck immediately. The target is behind the counter, moving fast, calling out orders.

They look up and catch your eye. Something passes over their face - not surprise. Recognition.

objects.name: Lunch Crowd
objects.description: Twenty or so people milling around with food. Oblivious. Every one of them is a potential domino.

objects.name: Menu Board
objects.description: Hand-painted. Today's special is circled in chalk. Something about it makes you uneasy and you can't explain why.

Taco Time Truck Interior.name: Taco Time Truck Interior
Taco Time Truck Interior.description: Cramped and blazing hot. Two burners running, a deep fryer bubbling, a propane line running to both. The target works the grill with practiced speed. There is barely room for one person in here.

furniture.name: Storage Shelf
furniture.description: A narrow shelf above the prep area with condiments and supplies.

objects.name: Deep Fryer
objects.description: A commercial deep fryer at full temperature. The oil is at the brim.

objects.name: Propane Line
objects.description: A flexible hose connecting the burners to a tank outside. It runs under your feet.

objects.name: Service Window
objects.description: The opening where orders are handed out. The only exit besides the back.

Adjacent Alley.name: Adjacent Alley
Adjacent Alley.description: A narrow alley between the parking lot and a concrete wall. Dumpsters. A stray cat. The propane tanks for the truck are stored back here, chained to a fence.

objects.name: Propane Tank Rack
objects.description: Three commercial propane tanks chained to the fence. One of the fittings looks corroded.

objects.name: Stray Cat
objects.description: A grey cat watches you from atop a dumpster with complete disdain.
